description_long: This humanoid robot features a sleek, streamlined body with a smooth, white exterior and a glossy black faceplate. Its head is rounded and seamlessly integrated with the torso, which tapers to a point at the base, giving it a futuristic, aerodynamic appearance. The faceplate is dominated by two large, glowing blue oval eyes, set against a black background, suggesting advanced visual sensors. The arms are slender, elongated, and attached at the sides, with no visible joints or hands, emphasizing a minimalist design. The back and sides are free of any visible mechanical details, panels, or appendages, maintaining a clean and modern look. The overall form is reminiscent of advanced service or companion robots designed for urban environments.
description: A sleek, white humanoid robot with a rounded head, glowing blue eyes, and minimalist, elongated arms. Its smooth, streamlined body and glossy black faceplate give it a futuristic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the robot's large blue eyes on a glossy black faceplate and both arms symmetrically positioned at its sides.
description_view_1: Three-quarter rear view highlighting the smooth, rounded back of the head and the side profile of the arms, with one blue eye partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fully rounded back of the head and body, with both arms visible as elongated panels and no facial features present.
description_view_3: Three-quarter rear view from the opposite side, showing the smooth curvature of the head and body, and a partial view of one blue eye.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with head facing forward, arms extended downward and slightly outward along the sides, body and head aligned vertically.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; exterior consists of integrated, smooth white panels with a glossy black faceplate and no decorative elements.
attribute_facial_features: Face consists of a glossy black surface with two large, glowing blue oval eyes; no visible mouth, nose, or other facial features.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms are elongated and attached at the sides with no visible joints or hands, suggesting limited or no articulation; no visible legs or feet.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible visual sensors in the form of two large blue eyes on the faceplate; no other sensors visible.
